D

D property in object HybridShapePlaneEquation
Gets D coefficient for plane equation.
DA property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the cutback factor used when the time integration accuracy tolerance is exceeded.
DB property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the cutback factor for the next increment when too many equilibrium iterations are used in the current increment.
DC property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the cutback factor used when the logarithmic rate of convergence predicts that too many equilibrium iterations will be needed.
DD property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the increase factor when two consecutive increments converge in a small number of equilibrium iterations.
DE property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the minimum ratio of proposed next time increment to the last successful time increment for extrapolation of the solution vector to take place.
DFs property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the fraction of stability limit used as current time increment when the time increment exceeds the above factor times the stability</br> limit.
DG property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the increase factor for the next time increment, as a ratio of the average integration accuracy measure over I<sub>T</sub></br> increments to the corresponding tolerance, when the time integration accuracy measure is less than W<sub>G</sub> of the tolerance during</br> I<sub>T</sub> consecutive increments.
DH property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the cutback factor used when element calculations have problems such as excessive distortion in large-displacement problems.
DL property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the minimum ratio of proposed next time increment to D<sub>M</sub> times the current time increment for the proposed time</br> increment to be used in a linear transient problem.
DLNameCreationRight property in object DLNameSettingAtt
Returns or set the right to create new DLNames.
DM property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum time increment increase factor for all cases except dynamic stress analysis and diffusion-dominated processes.
DMdif property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum time increment increase factor for diffusion-dominated processes (creep, transient heat transfer, soils</br> consolidation, transient mass diffusion).
DMdyn property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum time increment increase factor for dynamic stress analysis.
DR property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum allowable ratio of time increment to stability limit for conditionally stable time integration procedures.
DS property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the cutback factor used when too many iterations arise because of severe discontinuities.
DT property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the increase factor for the time increment directly before a time point or end time of a step is reached.

Retrieves the flag that determines the interaction damage bond behavior.
DamageBondInteractionBehavior property in object SimInteractionProperty

I

IA property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum number of attempts allowed for an increment.
IC property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the upper limit on the number of consecutive equilibrium iterations (without severe discontinuities), based on prediction of<br/> the logarithmic rate of convergence.
ICA property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum number of allowed contact augmentations if the augmented Lagrange contact constraint enforcement method is specified.
ICJ property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum number of equilibrium and severe discontinuity iterations allowed in two consecutive increments<br/> for the time increment to be increased if CONVERT SDI=YES.
ICS property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum number of equilibrium and severe discontinuity iterations allowed in an increment if CONVERT SDI=YES.
IG property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum number of consecutive equilibrium iterations (without severe discontinuities) allowed in consecutive increments<br/> for the time increment to be increased.
IJ property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum number of severe discontinuity iterations allowed in two consecutive increments for the<br/> time increment to be increased if CONVERT SDI=NO.
IL property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the number of consecutive equilibrium iterations (without severe discontinuities) above which the size of the next increment will be reduced.
IOAddress property in object OlpVariable
The address of the variable on the robot controller.
IODirection property in object OlpVariable
The direction of the variable.
IP property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the number of consecutive equilibrium iterations (without severe discontinuities) after which the residual tolerance is used.
IR property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the number of consecutive equilibrium iterations (without severe discontinuities) at which logarithmic rate of convergence check begins.
IS property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the maximum number of severe discontinuity iterations allowed in an increment if CONVERT SDI=NO.
IT property in object SimSolutionControls
Returns or sets the minimum number of consecutive increments in which the time integration accuracy measure must be satisfied<br/> without any cutbacks to allow a time increment increase.
Id property in object OlpAstLeaf
Identifies the function of the node or otherwise helps the translator find a node among its siblings.
Id property in object OlpAstNode
Identifies the function of the node or otherwise helps the translator find a node among its siblings.
Id property in object OlpAstBranch
Identifies the function of the node or otherwise helps the translator find a node among its siblings.
IdentificationLineSide property in object DrawingWelding
Returns or sets the welding identification line Side of the drawing welding symbol.
Identifier property in object PCBArea
Identifier property in object FlexibleArea
Returns or sets the identifier of the flexible constraint area.
ImagePrintPrecisionMode property in object DrawingGenViewProperties
Returns or sets the print precision mode for views generated as pixel image (DPI).
ImageViewMode property in object DrawingGenViewProperties
Returns or sets the representation mode for views generated as pixel image.
ImageVisuPrecisionMode property in object DrawingGenViewProperties
Returns or sets the visualization precision mode for views generated as pixel image (DPI).
ImaginaryRadius property in object Hyperbola2D
Returns the minor radius of the hyperbola in 2D space.
ImplicitLawInterpolationMode property in object HybridShapeIntegratedLaw
Gets or sets Interpolation mode for implicit law.
ImposedVertices property in object VarRadEdgeFillet
Returns the collection of vertices where a radius has been imposed.
ImprovedDTMethodFlag property in object SimExplicitDynamicStep
<br/>TRUE: Improved DT method option is activated.
ImprovedDTMethodFlag property in object SimCoupledThermalStressExplicitStep
Returns or sets the improved DT method flag.
InBooleanOperation property in object Body
